case_title: MARK STRUM MBA, INC. VS. MARKY LYNN QUAYLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT.
